changes.reason: P0 website feedback #56 reported 'Mac 无法开机'; no existing canonical article covers Mac no-power/startup-screen triage.

canonicalReview.notes: Existing Mac canonical articles cover DFU firmware recovery, login password reset, and camera failures. They mention startup or black screen only as related boundaries and do not cover first-line power, display, accessory, startup-screen, and M2 Mac mini service-program triage.
